projects.title: Corporate Website - Coding Mitra (Codemate)
projects.description: Developed a responsive corporate website for an IT services company focused on software, AI/ML, and cloud solutions.
projects.longDescription: Built a scalable and responsive corporate website with modern UI/UX, SEO optimization, and lead generation contact forms. Implemented cross-device compatible pages using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, and REST API integrations.
highlights: SEO optimization and lead generation forms

projects.title: Decentralized ERP for Payroll & Resource Optimization
projects.description: Built a decentralized ERP concept on BSC with streaming payroll, split-wallet architecture, and AI dashboard integration.
projects.longDescription: Developed a Decentralized ERP architecture on Binance Smart Chain with Solidity smart contracts for real-time stablecoin payroll streaming. Designed an 85/15 split-wallet system with automated yield generation and an AI-driven dashboard using MERN stack and Web3/Ethers.js integration.
highlights: AI dashboard with MERN and Web3 integration
